title: Device Home Screen - Multiple devices - Turning off devices
scenario: Verify that turning off one of multiple paired Poly Bluetooth headsets shows it as disconnected in the Poly Studio Mobile app while other devices remain connected
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Pair and connect multiple Poly Bluetooth headsets (e.g., Headset A, Headset B, Headset C) to the app via the Home screen.
3. Verify all headsets appear as connected on the Home screen.
4. Turn off Headset A by pressing and holding its Power button.
5. Observe the Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Turn off Headset B by pressing and holding its Power button.
7. Observe the Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. Turn off Headset C by pressing and holding its Power button.
9. Observe the Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: Each headset, when turned off, should immediately appear as \"Disconnected\" in the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen. The remaining connected headsets should stay listed as \"Connected\" and continue to function normally. When all headsets are turned off one by one, each should properly display as disconnected.
